---
title: "6.00 reality"
date: 2025-07-07  # (your last edit date)
image: "logo_orange_words.png"
categories: [NOS, drafting]
description: "ℹ️ **README:** reality post content"
draft: true
---

:::

<div style="font-size:0.85em; color:#555; margin-top:0.5em;">
Author: Chip Brock · Published: May 14, 2025
</div>

---

::: {.column-margin}
![](logo_orange_words.png){ width=120px }
:::

Under Construction 🚧 👷‍♂️

Watch this space.

:::
